headline: Veralto (VLTO) to Acquire GlobalVision to Support AI Packaging Quality Software
summary: Veralto Corporation (NYSE:VLTO) is one of the 10 Best Young Stocks to Buy Right Now. Veralto Corporation (NYSE:VLTO) is one of the best young stocks to buy right now. On March 31, Veralto entered into a definitive agreement to acquire GlobalVision, which is a Montreal-based provider of AI-augmented packaging quality and compliance software. The acquisition […]
